texto: There are humans, and there are ghosts. Vampires are just in a different state of transition. Not part of the human world and not part of the spirit world. We are just caught somewhere in between life and the real death.
explicacao: Citação de K.M. McFarland sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “There are humans, and there are ghosts. Vampires are just in a different state of transition. Not…” articula reflexao, kindlehighlight, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao.
